description: Configure the laboratory Chrome browser according to the Gemology Lab Browser Spec. Organize the 16 professional industry bookmarks on the bookmark bar into four folders: 'Grading & Labs', 'Market Data', 'Compliance', and 'Lab Equipment'. Remove the five personal/shopping bookmarks from both the Bookmarks and the Browsing History. Set the default font size to 20 or larger. Update the default download location to '/home/ga/Documents/Appraisal_Reports', enable the option to 'Ask where to save each file before downloading', and block third-party cookies.
